options.a: "Turbulence” refer to a change of wind velocity above a prevailing strength within a 10 minute time limit.
options.b: “Turbulence" refer to a change of wind velocity above a prevailing strength within a 1 minute time limit.
options.c: "Gusts" refer to a change of wind speed or direction over a vertical or horizontal distance, no time limit.
options.d: "Gusts” refer to a change of wind velocity above a prevailing strength within a 1 minute time limit.
